calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 09, 2019 is admitted to probate. William G. Britting is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 09, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Continued To Feb-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
